As a cybersecurity expert with 15 years in the field, I've seen firsthand how vulnerable our systems are. We can't afford to rely on foreign tech giants for critical infrastructure. The real cost isn't just economic - it's about our fundamental rights. #DigitalSovereignty #NationalSecurity
